snippet.title: Hurricane - LOCO LOCO - Serbia рҹҮ·рҹҮё  - Official Music Video - Eurovision 2021
snippet.description:
Hurricane will represent Serbia at the Eurovision Song Contest 2021 with the song LOCO LOCO.
-
Composer: Nemanja AntoniДҮ
Lyrics: Sanja VuДҚiДҮ
Arrangement: Nemanja AntoniДҮ, Darko Dimitrov
-
Lyrics:
Nemoj da se ljutiЕЎ, hrabrost skupi
Jedna cura kao ja ne traЕҫi obeДҮanja
Ne skidaЕЎ taj pogled ti sa mene
Lako uЕЎla sam ja u tvoje vene

Osmeh tvoj mi kaЕҫe
Da me ЕҫeliЕЎ koga laЕҫeЕЎ
Slatka kao ДҮoko moko
Hajde budi loco

Ram ba-ba-bam
A ja slatka sam i fina
A ti si sam sam sam
I ja znam znam znam
Da biЕҫe lom lom lom
Zato hajde budi loco loco

Baby, baby, baby, ДҚemu drama
Jedna cura kao ja ne traЕҫi obeДҮanja
Baby, baby, baby, igram sama
To ЕЎto nisi sa mnom to je tvoja mana

Osmeh tvoj mi kaЕҫe
Da me ЕҫeliЕЎ koga laЕҫeЕЎ
Slatka kao ДҚoko moko
Hajde budi loco

1, 2... Girls, Come on!
Loco loco
Loco loco
Loco loco

Ne skidaЕЎ pogled sa mene
Lako sam ti uЕЎla u vene
Hajde budi loco loco

A ja slatka sam i fina
A ti si sam sam sam
I ja znam znam znam
Da biДҮe lom lom lom
Zato hajde budi loco loco
A ja slatka sam i fina
A ti si sam sam sam
I ja znam znam znam
Da biДҮe lom lom lom
Zato hajde budi loco loco

-

If you want to know more about the Eurovision Song Contest, visit https://eurovision.tv

Shop the official Eurovision Song Contest merchandise: https://shop.eurovision.tv/
Follow us on Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/eurovision 
Follow us on Twitter: https://twitter.com/Eurovision

snippet.title: Evo ЕЎto Srbi misle o VuДҚiДҮevoj izjavi da je malvazija odvratno vino
snippet.description: Tijekom gostovanja na sarajevskoj komercijalnoj televiziji Face u intervjuu snimljenom ranije ovaj tjedan VuДҚiДҮ je rekao kako je "vino (malvazija) odvratno i nitko ga ne moЕҫe piti". U nedjelju ujutro se istarskim vinarima ispriДҚao zbog te izjave, a evo kako tu izjavu komentiraju njegovi sugraД‘ani te ЕЎto misle o vinu.

snippet.title: CBC News: The National | Meghan and HarryвҖҷs Oprah interview; Vaccine optimism | March 7, 2021
snippet.description:
Prince Harry and Meghan sit down with Oprah for a revealing interview about leaving their roles as senior royals. The reasons to be optimistic about the vaccine rollout and the road ahead. Plus, the officer charged with killing George Floyd goes on trial. 

#HarryandMeghan
#COVID19
#GeorgeFloyd

snippet.title: UFC 260: Miocic vs Ngannou 2 вҖ“ One More Shot | Official Trailer
snippet.description:
The foundations of the Octagon will shake on March 27 when the sportвҖҷs premier big men, UFC heavyweight champion Stipe Miocic and number one contender Francis Ngannou meet for the second time in the main event of UFC 260. Widely considered to be the greatest heavyweight in UFC history, Miocic defeated Ngannou in 2018, but in his last four bouts, вҖңThe PredatorвҖқ has scored four consecutive first-round knockouts, proving that he is more than ready to face ClevelandвҖҷs finest once again. Plus, fresh from a pair of victories over Max Holloway, UFC featherweight champion Alexander вҖңThe GreatвҖқ Volkanovski defends his crown against Brian вҖңT-CityвҖқ Ortega.

localized.description:
Oprah made her TV return with Meghan and Harry in a riveting two hour interview about drama with the Royal Family, the reaction from the UK was fierce, the Senate passed President BidenвҖҷs $1.9 trillion COVID relief package, the CDC announced that those who have been fully vaccinated can gather indoors with smaller groups, Donald Trump doesnвҖҷt want the RNC and Republican committees using his name and likeness to raise money, Pope Francis visited the top ShiвҖҷite Cleric of Iraq to send a message of peace between the Catholic and Muslim worlds, it was fantasy suite night on вҖңThe BachelorвҖқ and love was in the air, and Jimmy chats with the editor of the conservative blog вҖңThe Daily RageвҖқ who is leading a protest against Space JamвҖҷs new depiction of Lola Bunny.

About Jimmy Kimmel Live:

Jimmy Kimmel serves as host and executive producer of EmmyВ®-nominated вҖңJimmy Kimmel Live!,вҖқ ABCвҖҷs late-night talk show. вҖңJimmy Kimmel Live!вҖқ is well known for its huge viral video successes, with over 11 billion views and more than 15 million subscribers on the showвҖҷs YouTube channel. Some of KimmelвҖҷs most popular comedy bits include вҖңCelebrities Read Mean Tweets,вҖқ вҖңLie Witness News,вҖқ вҖңUnnecessary Censorship,вҖқ вҖңHalloween Candy YouTube Challenge,вҖқ and music videos like вҖңI (Wanna) Channing All Over Your Tatum.вҖқ

snippet.title: Meghan Markle Says Kate Middleton Made Her Cry Before Wedding
snippet.description:
Meghan Markle is setting the record straight. The former вҖңSuitsвҖқ star spoke with Oprah Winfrey during a bombshell tell-all on CBS, where she addressed a past rumor that she made Kate Middleton cry prior to her wedding to Prince Harry. She said the situation was actually the opposite, and that it was actually Kate who made her cry and that her sister-in-law ended up apologizing.

snippet.description:

From tea on an open top bus to visiting the "Fresh Prince of Bel Air" mansion, Prince Harry gets the tour he never dreamed of. snippet.title: The Harry-Meghan-Oprah Interview Is All the Buzz
snippet.description:
James Corden kicks off the show recapping Oprah Winfey's interview with Prince Harry and Meghan, and James realizes the "wedding" he attended wasn't very official at all. And James gives us a handsy tutorial on how to milk a cow. After, Reggie Watts attempts to explain NFT art to James, who cannot pronounce "indistinguishable."

More Late Late Show:

Get new episodes of shows you love across devices the next day, stream live TV, and watch full seasons of CBS fan favorites anytime, anywhere with CBS All Access. Try it free! http://bit.ly/1OQA29B

Each week night, THE LATE LATE SHOW with JAMES CORDEN throws the ultimate late night after party with a mix of celebrity guests, edgy musical acts, games and sketches. Corden differentiates his show by offering viewers a peek behind-the-scenes into the green room, bringing all of his guests out at once and lending his musical and acting talents to various sketches. Additionally, bandleader Reggie Watts and the house band provide original, improvised music throughout the show. Since Corden took the reigns as host in March 2015, he has quickly become known for generating buzzworthy viral videos, such as Carpool Karaoke."

snippet.title: Starship | SN10 | High-Altitude Flight Test
snippet.description:
As early as Wednesday, March 3, the SpaceX team will attempt a high-altitude flight test of Starship serial number 10 (SN10) вҖ“ our third high-altitude suborbital flight test of a Starship prototype from SpaceXвҖҷs site in Cameron County, Texas. Similar to the high-altitude flight tests of Starship SN8 and SN9, SN10 will be powered through ascent by three Raptor engines, each shutting down in sequence prior to the vehicle reaching apogee вҖ“ approximately 10 km in altitude. SN10 will perform a propellant transition to the internal header tanks, which hold landing propellant, before reorienting itself for reentry and a controlled aerodynamic descent.
  
The Starship prototype will descend under active aerodynamic control, accomplished by independent movement of two forward and two aft flaps on the vehicle. All four flaps are actuated by an onboard flight computer to control StarshipвҖҷs attitude during flight and enable precise landing at the intended location. SN10вҖҷs Raptor engines will then reignite as the vehicle attempts a landing flip maneuver immediately before touching down on the landing pad adjacent to the launch mount. 

A controlled aerodynamic descent with body flaps and vertical landing capability, combined with in-space refilling, are critical to landing Starship at destinations across the solar system where prepared surfaces or runways do not exist, and returning to Earth. This capability will enable a fully reusable transportation system designed to carry both crew and cargo on long-duration, interplanetary flights and help humanity return to the Moon, and travel to Mars and beyond.  

Given the dynamic schedule of development testing, stay tuned to our social media channels for updates as we move toward SpaceXвҖҷs third high-altitude flight test of Starship!

JoЕЎ me hrani nada da me pamtiЕЎ, 
Da sam ti sve, 
Ljubav nije uzmeЕЎ pa je vratiЕЎ 
Boli me... 

Tvoja ljubav je hram ljubavi 
I kad lomi se nebo ti zlato i srebro si, 
Hram ljubavi, 
Pobeda nam je predaja, zauvek duЕЎe su nam ogledala 
Ne veruj ni reДҚ samo srca znaju 
Kad od Еҫelje gube dah; 
Ova ljubav je poДҚela na kraju, 
Al imam snage za taj strah..

snippet.title: Oprah Winfrey on her bombshell Harry and Meghan interview
snippet.description:
Oprah Winfrey joined "CBS This Morning" the day after her wide-ranging interview with Prince Harry and Meghan, Duchess of Sussex aired on CBS. Winfrey is reacting to some of the most explosive moments of the interview, and what she learned from the couple. Watch Oprah's full primetime special with Meghan and Prince Harry here: https://bit.ly/3t24kAK

Subscribe to the "CBS This Morning" YouTube channel: https://bit.ly/3ceNNCX
Watch more "CBS This Morning": http://bit.ly/1T88yAR
Like "CBS This Morning" on Facebook: https://on.fb.me/1LhtdvI
Follow "CBS This Morning" on Instagram: https://bit.ly/1Q7NGnY
Follow "CBS This Morning" on Twitter: https://bit.ly/1Xj5W3p
Follow CBS News on Twitter: https://bit.ly/3bdNXek

Get the latest news and best in original reporting from CBS News delivered to your inbox. Sign up for newsletters: https://cbsn.ws/1RqHw7T

Get your news on the go! Download CBS News mobile apps for Android and iOS: https://cbsn.ws/1Xb1WC8

Get new episodes of shows you love across devices the next day, stream local news live, and watch full seasons of CBS fan favorites and originals anytime, anywhere with Paramount+. Sign up here: https://bit.ly/309gCe2

---
Each weekday morning, "CBS This Morning" co-hosts Gayle King, Anthony Mason and Tony Dokoupil deliver two hours of original reporting, breaking news and top-level newsmaker interviews in an engaging and informative format that challenges the norm in network morning news programs. The broadcast has earned a prestigious Peabody Award, a Polk Award, four News & Documentary Emmys, three Daytime Emmys and the 2017 Edward R. Murrow Award for Best Newscast. The broadcast was also honored with an Alfred I. duPont-Columbia Award as part of CBS News division-wide coverage of the shootings at Sandy Hook Elementary School in Newtown, Connecticut. Check local listings for "CBS This Morning" broadcast times.

snippet.title: I'm back.
snippet.description:
Schlatt moves to Texas. Texas starts snowing. Life is suffering.

Follow me on Twitter:
https://twitter.com/jschlatt

Follow me on Instagram:
https://instagram.com/jschlatt

Schlatt is in Texas and Texas is in Schlatt but I wish it was 10 Big Hot Men in me instead. Hello from the deep south! In this commentary video Schlatt talks about stuff for 8 minutes and change, which is just long enough to pollute the video with multiple midroll ads to make as much money as possible. He talks about the awful Texas Snowstorm 2021, which left millions of people out of power thanks to Ercot - kind of like when Schlatt has a heart attack and perishes on the Dream SMP! I put TommyInnit in the video for half a second just so I can also include him in the description. Maybe I should've titled this Commentary Video "Minecraft's Snowstorm Mod Is Incredibly Funny," and then the thumbnail is Schlatt in a red shirt. Who Is Ranboo? I Still Don't Know. I'm old and grumpy and in Texas with my best friends Mizkif, Trainwrecks, Pokelawls, Esfand, and Marriott International. The power in my house is out but At Least I Have My Blankets. It's almost like I brought the cold weather down south with me. If only I could bring the pizza and bagels with me, too -- maybe have a good old New York Slice of Pizza Pie at my favorite New York City Bodega with New York City Mayoral Candidate Andrew "Chicken Soup" Yang. Better yet, me and Davey Pageviews go out to John's at Bleecker Street, get a 10/10 and then day trade some no-name pink sheet company up 500% by closing. That's what I call a Portnoy Pump! /j /hj /ij /lh

snippet.title: Emanet 133. BГ¶lГјm FragmanДұ | Legacy Episode 133 Promo (English & Spanish subs)
snippet.description:
Abone Ol / Subscribe: https://bit.ly/2TLyNnG
Yaman KДұrДұmlДұ is a successful and young businessman who had a rough childhood but never gave up, on the contrary he even became stronger with every obstacle. He started his life from the bottom and became very wealthy. All he has in his world, is a family that he has to take care of after his fatherвҖҷs death. He closed his heart to all romantic feelings a long time ago and his only weakness is his 5-year old nephewвҖҰ Little Yusuf is very well protected under his uncleвҖҷs arms, but he craves loves and sympathy. The only happy image in his mind is his aunt Seher. 
 
Seher is a beautiful and humble girl living with her grandfather. Her life is shaken by the death of her sister who was the bride of the KДұrДұmlДұ family. From now on, she has a legacy she has to take care at all costs: Her little nephew Yusuf. This adventure will arise the long hidden secrets of the KДұrДұmlДұ mansion; while a whole another legacy will start to grow in Seher and Yaman's hearts. 

#Legacy
#Emanet
#SehYam
#Shorts

snippet.title: Najjednostavnija ДҚokoladna torta sa piЕЎkotama - bez kuvanja i peДҚenja
snippet.description:
ДҢokoladna torta sa piЕЎkotama je za sve one koji vole mnogo bogatog krema. Iz naslova vidimo da je sa ДҚokoladom, kao i da je priprema veoma jednostavna, tako da ДҮe se sigurno dopasti svima sa nedostatkom vremena. Tortu sa piЕЎkotama moЕҫete da pravite uz dodavanje nekih svojih omiljenih sastojaka jer je apsolutno podloЕҫna promenama. 

Pisani recept moЕҫete pronaДҮi na https://domacirecepti.net/cokoladna-torta-sa-piskotama-video/

DomaДҮi recepti je kanal na kojem prikazujemo video recepte za torte, kolaДҚe, pogaДҚe, kifle. MoЕҫete naДҮi predjela kao i glavna jela. Pravimo joЕЎ i sitne kolaДҚe, kolaДҚe za slavu, lepinje, posna jela, slavske pogaДҚe.

в–¶ MoЕҫete nas podrЕҫati i na ovaj naДҚin: https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCziASxiSNISFR_FxJ8vFjnA/join

рқҗ’рқҗҡрқҗ¬рқҗӯрқҗЁрқҗЈрқҗңрқҗў:

1 l slatke pavlake
400 g tamne ДҚokolade
160 g mleДҚne ДҚokolade
4 pakovanja piЕЎkota
120 g ЕЎlaga od ДҚokolade

joЕЎ mleko za umakanje piЕЎkota

snippet.title: New BMW M4 review: see how quick it is 0-60mph & 1/4-mile!
snippet.description:
Head to http://bit.ly/-Spring-Event to check out a load of all-new & exclusive carwow Spring Deals! Be quick though - theyвҖҷre only there until March 31st! 
.............................................................

Introducing the all-new BMW M4! 

ThatвҖҷs right, MatвҖҷs finally got his hands on the new M4 Competition! We know certain elements (рҹ‘Җ) of the M4вҖҷs design may not be to everyoneвҖҷs taste, but does the new M4 offer enough changes elsewhere to help you overlook them?

Well with it being a BMW M, we need to start with performanceвҖҰ And we can assure you that the new M3 & M4 do NOT disappoint! With a 3-litre straight-six turbo, they can put down a whopping 510hp and 650Nm, while it can easily shoot you to 60mph in under 4 seconds!

But of course, we know youвҖҷre probably still not happy with that new grille. But letвҖҷs be honest, given it was announced so long ago, arenвҖҷt we all kind of used to it now? Or are you still so disappointed you canвҖҷt bear to look yet? 

So what do you think? The performance is exactly the same as the new BMW M3 Competition, but would you choose the coupe M4 over the saloon M3? Let us know in the comments!

snippet.title: Full Replay: Starship SN10 Flight Test, Landing, and Post-Flight BOOM!
snippet.description:
SpaceX is set to launch the Starship SN10 prototype to an altitude of approximately 10 kilometers. A launch attempt is possible between 9 am and 6 pm Central time on Wednesday. However, as with testing, there is always a chance that teams could decide to stand down and try again on a different day.

snippet.title: Dvanaest godina nije obukao ДҚarape
snippet.description:
ЕҪarko HrgiДҮ i Zenice neobiДҚan je po svemu. Dvanaest godina Еҫivi u ЕЎpilji uz Babinu rijeku  bez struje i vode. Nikada vatru nije naloЕҫio, nikada se nije razbolio a jedan od njegovih recepata je Еҫivot bez ДҚarapa na nogama. Umjesto ДҚarapa ЕҪarko noge oblaЕҫe prvo papirom od vreДҮa za braЕЎno a zatim sve to obloЕҫi najlonom. Nakon toga obuva obuДҮa na noge. Bez obzira na vanjsku temperaturu ЕҪare ne nosi ДҚarape. snippet.title: KONAДҢNI OBRAДҢUN SA REPTILIMA: Mi smo deo velikog sukoba, ЕЎtiti nas moДҮna galaktiДҚka federacija!
snippet.description:
Gost na YouTube kanalu "Nauka i Misterije Balkan" bio je Aleksandar Hengl, osnivaДҚ druЕЎtva prijatelja "Povratak Izvoru". On je medijum, astralni putnik i komunikacioni kanal za vanzemaljske civilizacije galaktiДҚke federacije, u misiji za podizanje svesti usnulog ДҚoveДҚanstva i njegovu integraciju u galaktiДҚke tokove i Univerzumske Unifikacije. Kao osnivaДҚ duhovnog centra вҖңPovratak IzvoruвҖқ u Novom Sadu, organizuje edukativne skupove "Susret nauke i duhovnosti". TakoД‘e je i saradnik serijala emisija вҖңKosmosвҖқ. PreporuДҚujemo Vam da pogledate celu emisiju i saznate viЕЎe o brojnim zanimljivim temama.

Emisiju je vodio novinar Aleksandar PavkoviДҮ.

*************************************************************

Zabranjeno je svako preuzimanje snimaka i objavljivanje na drugim YouTube kanalima. Svi duplikati ДҮe biti uklanjani u skladu sa YouTube pravilima. Iz ovoga ДҮe biti izuzeti samo oni koji dobiju specijalnu dozvolu od vlasnika autorskih prava.

https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCLG5Qu54Q7gywaCeDs5etuQ

Svi koji verno prate emisije i Еҫele da pomognu rad naЕЎe produkcije to mogu uДҚiniti iz Srbije i iz inostranstva. TrudiДҮemo se da ostanemo dosledni naЕЎoj ideji o slobodnom novinarstvu i ЕЎirenju istine bez cenzure.

snippet.description:

As well as some noticeable tweaks to the livery there was also plenty of technical detail on show, giving us lots to sink our teeth into as we look for the key clues of how Ferrari is going to turn its fortunes around in 2021.

snippet.title: Drone footage shows damaged buildings after powerful earthquake in Greece
snippet.description:
A strong 6.2 magnitude earthquake struck the region of Larissa in central Greece on Wednesday, damaging houses and vehicles and sending people fleeing from their homes.
 
Drone footage captured over Damasi village showed stone houses destroyed and bricks fallen from walls. 

In the village of Damasi, home to 1,500 residents, the schoolhouse and several other homes suffered extensive damage as roofs and walls collapsed, some of them onto parked vehicles, burying them in rubble.

There were no initial reports of casualties or serious injuries from the quake.

Greek seismologists said there was a sequence of post-quake tremors and advised schools to stay closed in the coming days.

For more info, please go to https://globalnews.ca/news/7640406/banff-earthquake-folo-feb-14-2020/

snippet.title: OSIJEK vs GORICA 1:1 (24.kolo, HT Prva liga 20/21)
snippet.description:
U vrlo vaЕҫnom dvoboju 24. kola HT Prve lige za vrh ljestvice Osijek i Gorica su osvojili po bod odigravЕЎi 1:1. Iznimno uzbudljivo pogotovo je bilo u sudaДҚkoj nadoknadi susreta.

Dvoboj je poДҚeo ЕЎansom Miereza, no vrlo brzo je Gorica pokazala da moЕҫe igrati ravnopravno kod Osijeka. Vremenom, gosti iz Velike Gorice ostavljali su i dojam organiziranije i konkretnije momДҚadi.

Igralo se vrlo ДҚvrsto, a nakon nekoliko solidnih ЕЎansi s obje strane u 55. minuti je postignut prvi pogodak. Matar Dieye je iz drugog pokuЕЎaja, nakon uvodne dobre reakcije osjeДҚkog vratara IvuЕЎiДҮa, zabio za 1:0 gostiju.

Osijek je bio osuД‘en loviti zaostatak, ali do sudaДҚke nadoknade imao je samo jednu dobru ЕЎansu (Mierez). No, u nadoknadi je krenula ludnica.

Prvo je Bohar realizirao jedanaesterac u 91. minuti, dok je Ante Erceg u 95. iz blizine zabio za 2:1. Ipak, VAR provjera je pokazala da je igraДҚ Osijeka tom prilikom bio u minimalnom zaleД‘u.

Osijek je time napravio korak unatrag u borbi za sam vrh ljestvice, a Gorica je ostala na pet bodova iza Osijeka.

Kao i sve ranije utakmice ovog kola, tako je i u Osijeku susret zapoДҚeo minutom ЕЎutnje u znak preminulog velikana hrvatskog nogometa Zlatka KranjДҚara.

HT Prva liga, 24. kolo: Osijek - Gorica 1:1 (Bohar 90.+1-11m / Dieye 55.)

snippet.title: Emanet 131. BГ¶lГјm FragmanДұ | Legacy Episode 131 Promo (English & Spanish subs)
snippet.description:
Abone Ol / Subscribe: https://bit.ly/2TLyNnG
Yaman KДұrДұmlДұ is a successful and young businessman who had a rough childhood but never gave up, on the contrary he even became stronger with every obstacle. He started his life from the bottom and became very wealthy. All he has in his world, is a family that he has to take care of after his fatherвҖҷs death. He closed his heart to all romantic feelings a long time ago and his only weakness is his 5-year old nephewвҖҰ Little Yusuf is very well protected under his uncleвҖҷs arms, but he craves loves and sympathy. The only happy image in his mind is his aunt Seher. 
 
Seher is a beautiful and humble girl living with her grandfather. Her life is shaken by the death of her sister who was the bride of the KДұrДұmlДұ family. From now on, she has a legacy she has to take care at all costs: Her little nephew Yusuf. This adventure will arise the long hidden secrets of the KДұrДұmlДұ mansion; while a whole another legacy will start to grow in Seher and Yaman's hearts. 

#Legacy
#Emanet
#SehYam
#Shorts

snippet.title: DINAMO vs RIJEKA 2:0 (24.kolo, HT Prva liga 20/21)
snippet.description:
Derbi utakmica 24. kola HT Prve lige na maksimirskom stadionu zavrЕЎila je pobjedom Dinama protiv Rijeke od 2:0.

Dinamo je opet samostalno na vrhu ljestvice. Ima dva boda viЕЎe od Osijeka, ali i jedan susret manje odigran.

OdliДҚno je Dinamo otvorio utakmicu. OdluДҚno je krenuo po rani pogodak i on se dogodio u 27. minuti. Lijepu akciju odmjerenim je udarcem zakljuДҚio IvanuЕЎec za 1:0.

Nakon toga je uslijedilo odliДҚno razdoblje igre u kojem su obje momДҚadi vrlo opasno prijetile, a najbolju priliku je imao Menalo za Rijeku, no njegov je udarac zaustavio domaДҮi okvir vrata.

U nastavku je Dinamo traЕҫio drugi pogodak i potvrdu pobjede koja se dogodila u 67. minuti. Strijelac je bio OrЕЎiДҮ ДҚime je Dinamo "zabetonirao" novu pobjedu, osmu u nizu (u svim natjecanjima). U posljednje ДҚetiri utakmice Dinamo nije primio ni pogodak.

Kao i sve ranije utakmice ovog kola, tako je i u Zagrebu susret zapoДҚeo minutom ЕЎutnje u znak preminulog velikana Dinama i hrvatskog nogometa Zlatka KranjДҚara.

HT Prva liga, 24. kolo: Dinamo - Rijeka 2:0 (IvanuЕЎec 27., OrЕЎiДҮ 67.)

snippet.title: Perseverance RoverвҖҷs Descent and Touchdown on Mars (Official NASA Video)
snippet.description:
NASA's Mars 2020 Perseverance mission captured thrilling footage of its rover landing in Mars' Jezero Crater on Feb. 18, 2021.  The real footage in this video was captured by several cameras that are part of the rover's entry, descent, and landing suite. The views include a camera looking down from the spacecraft's descent stage (a kind of rocket-powered jet pack that helps fly the rover to its landing site), a camera on the rover looking up at the descent stage, a camera on the top of the aeroshell (a capsule protecting the rover) looking up at that parachute, and a camera on the bottom of the rover looking down at the Martian surface.
 
The audio embedded in the video comes from the mission control call-outs during entry, descent, and landing. 
 
For more information about Perseverance, visit https://mars.nasa.gov/perseverance
 
Credit: NASA/JPL-Caltech

Hey guys! In this video, Jfred hides in plain sight from all the dudes in the studio! Jfred full body paints himself with help from Dan (a studio professional) to match the scenery! The dudes have a select amount of time to find him in the warehouse or they are out of the next video! Do you think the guys will find Joey? Where do you think Joey will hide? Let us know down below! Some other videos you may like are Eating 1 Color Food for 24 hrs | Who will give up first?, We Put in a Ski Slope in the Edge Space!! | Larger Than Life!, and Pull Wrong Tooth & Get EATEN by the CROC!! We have also appeared on Dope or Nope, Rekt, and Battle universe! Who do you think will win??

snippet.title: Podcast Inkubator #572 - RoД‘endanski podcast S Raletom, Ivonom i Markom
snippet.description:
Tlo se nakon razornog potresa u srediЕЎnjoj Hrvatskoj zatreslo viЕЎe od 1000 puta. Svako novo podrhtavanje tla donosi novi nemir, a sliДҚan efekt u ovim napetim vremenima moЕҫe izazvati i vibracija mobitela. Zato ugasi vibru i preuzmi Smirilicu, umirujuДҮu melodiju zvona nastalu smirivanjem vibracija samog potresa. Smiri sebe i okolinu, preuzmi Smirilicu i doniraj za potresom pogoД‘ena podruДҚja, a viЕЎe saznaj ovdje: https://www.cinipravustvar.hr/smirilica
---------
DANAS Podcast Inkubator slavi svoj 4 roД‘endan! U tom smo razdoblju kao pioniri podcast forme na ovim prostorima na YouTube bespuДҮa izbacili debelo preko 600 emisija u kojima je gostovalo oko 400 razliДҚitih gostiju. Do sada je na naЕЎoj platformi djelovalo ДҚak 7 autora i zato ДҮemo iskoristiti ovu priliku zahvaliti se Dei RedЕҫiДҮ, Aidi Е ukurici i Fil Tilenu na tragu koji su ostavili u naЕЎem podcastu! NajveДҮa hvala ipak ide naЕЎoj vjernoj publici koja je od poДҚetka prepoznala naЕЎ sadrЕҫaj i koja nas i danas podrЕҫava i gura prema naprijed. I nama zvuДҚi nestvarno brojka od 150 milijuna pregleda koliko gotovo ima kanal ili ДҚak milijun jedinstvenih gledatelja koji su gledali naЕЎe emisije samo u proЕЎlom mjesecu!
---------

The Duke and Duchess of Sussex's much-anticipated interview with Oprah Winfrey has aired in the US - with the couple sharing their side of the story about life in the Royal Family.

The couple spoke about their relationships with other royals, racism and how their mental health suffered.

Meghan spoke with Oprah for most of the interview, before being joined by Prince Harry.

snippet.title: ObraДҮanje predsednika Srbije Aleksandra VuДҚiДҮa posle sednice Saveta za nacionalnu bezbednost (18+)
snippet.description:
NajbrЕҫe rastuДҮi portal u Srbiji https://www.alo.rs/вҖӢ 

Sednica Saveta za nacionalnu bezbednost na kojoj ДҮe se raspravljati o detaljima u vezi sa akcijom borbe protiv organizovanog kriminala u Srbiji odrЕҫala se u 18 ДҚasova u Palati Srbija.

Kako je VuДҚiДҮ najavio ranije danas, na sednici se razmatraju veoma ozbiljna pitanja, situacija oko korona virusa, nove prilike na Kosovu i Metohiji, u regionu, u svetu i Evropi, novoj administraciji u SAD, a pre svega o borbi protiv organizovanog kriminala.

#NajnovijeVestiSrbijaвҖӢ #AleksandarVuДҚiДҮвҖӢ #SavetZaNacionalnuBezbednostвҖӢ

snippet.description:
April 1993. Sarajevo je bilo pod dramatiДҚnom opsadom joЕЎ od proljecМҒa 1992. godine. Usred uniЕЎtavanja zemlja je postepeno pokuЕЎavala uspostaviti institucije.

MeД‘u njima je i KoЕЎarkaЕЎki savez BiH. Jedan od ciljeva bio im je putem sporta smjestiti Bosnu i Hercegovinu na kartu svijeta.

Misiju je vodio Mirza DelibaЕЎicМҒ, legenda jugoslavenske koЕЎarke, bivЕЎi igraДҚ Real Madrida, olimpijski, svjetski i evropski prvak.

snippet.title: See Mars Like Never Before! NASA's Perseverance Rover Sends New Video and Images of the Red Planet
snippet.description: NASAвҖҷs Perseverance Mars Rover safely touched down on the Red Planet on Feb. 18. So what will the robotic scientist "see" on her descent and what will she do next? Join mission experts for update about the rover вҖ“ the biggest, heaviest, cleanest, and most sophisticated six-wheeled robot ever launched into space вҖ“ including imagery it captured and its mission to explore Mars.

Skinucu ti taj Dior, s ramena s ramena,
Volim kako zvuci uzdah mog imena, s tvojih toplih usana,
Skinucu ti taj Dior, s ramena s ramena,
Kad mi tiho kazes sta da ti radim ja,
Benzin preko plamena.

Sa tobom sve je rulet, od milke do nule,
Brze nego Tesla S, ej
Tako ti je sa princezama, voli kad je vezana,
Pssst, Samo niko da ne cuje.

Ele ele ele ele
Ko bi reko da je mala ziva vatra.
Ele ele
Njene misli koje skriva nocu gresnije od pakla.

Subota uvece, susi, Buddha bar,
Leti ide se na Rodos,
Zivi zivot mala kao da je superstar,
Mamin i tatin je ponos.

snippet.title: 8.1 Earthquake Near Kermadec Islands, New Zealand - LIVE BREAKING NEWS COVERAGE
snippet.description:
BREAKING: An 8.1 earthquake has occurred near the Kermadec Islands, New Zealand, according to the USGS. There is a tsunami warning. Get the latest in our LIVE COVERAGE. 

This 8.1 earthquake comes less than two hours after a 7.4 earthquake struck near the Kermadec Islands in New Zealand. And earlier today, there was a 7.3 quake off the coast of New Zealand's North Island. New Zealand civil defense says there could be tsunami waves in New Zealand of up to three meters. There is a tsunami threat for other countries as well. In this interactive live stream, host Steve Lookner brings you the latest news on the 8.1 earthquake near the Kermadec Islands in New Zealand, along with the newest tsunami updates, and he'll also read your comments and questions on the air!

Follow us on Twitter!  http://twitter.com/AgendaFreeTV
Follow us on Facebook!  http://www.facebook.com/AgendaFreeTV
Follow us on Periscope!  @AgendaFreeTV

Your donations keep us on the air! 
Donate at http://agendafree.tv

Or get cool Agenda-Free TV rewards by supporting us on Patreon: http://www.patreon.com/agendafreetv

localized.title: 8.1 Earthquake Near Kermadec Islands, New Zealand - LIVE BREAKING NEWS COVERAGE
localized.description:
BREAKING: An 8.1 earthquake has occurred near the Kermadec Islands, New Zealand, according to the USGS. There is a tsunami warning. Get the latest in our LIVE COVERAGE. 

This 8.1 earthquake comes less than two hours after a 7.4 earthquake struck near the Kermadec Islands in New Zealand. And earlier today, there was a 7.3 quake off the coast of New Zealand's North Island. New Zealand civil defense says there could be tsunami waves in New Zealand of up to three meters. There is a tsunami threat for other countries as well. In this interactive live stream, host Steve Lookner brings you the latest news on the 8.1 earthquake near the Kermadec Islands in New Zealand, along with the newest tsunami updates, and he'll also read your comments and questions on the air!

snippet.title: Emanet 134. BГ¶lГјm FragmanДұ | Legacy Episode 134 Promo (English & Spanish subs)
snippet.description:
Abone Ol / Subscribe: https://bit.ly/2TLyNnG
Yaman KДұrДұmlДұ is a successful and young businessman who had a rough childhood but never gave up, on the contrary he even became stronger with every obstacle. He started his life from the bottom and became very wealthy. All he has in his world, is a family that he has to take care of after his fatherвҖҷs death. He closed his heart to all romantic feelings a long time ago and his only weakness is his 5-year old nephewвҖҰ Little Yusuf is very well protected under his uncleвҖҷs arms, but he craves loves and sympathy. The only happy image in his mind is his aunt Seher. 
 
Seher is a beautiful and humble girl living with her grandfather. Her life is shaken by the death of her sister who was the bride of the KДұrДұmlДұ family. From now on, she has a legacy she has to take care at all costs: Her little nephew Yusuf. This adventure will arise the long hidden secrets of the KДұrДұmlДұ mansion; while a whole another legacy will start to grow in Seher and Yaman's hearts.
